name: FNOL Received
description: First Notice of Loss filed. Claim created and assigned.

name: Employer Communication
description: Adjuster contacts employer to verify employment and incident details.

name: ER Report Received
description: ER treatment records received. Initial injury details documented — knee injury, no formal diagnosis yet.

name: Care Gap Alert
description: System flags care gap — orthopedics appointment not yet scheduled 6 days after ER referral.

name: IW Communication
description: Adjuster takes recorded statement from injured worker.

name: Orthopedics Appointment Scheduled
description: Orthopedics appointment scheduled for Jun 28. ER referral care gap resolved.

name: Orthopedics Reports Received
description: Orthopedic reports received — diagnosis confirmed, MRI ordered, surgery recommended.

name: Care Gap Alert
description: System flags care gap — PT not yet scheduled 6 days post-surgery, recovery window narrowing.

name: PT Scheduled
description: Physical therapy referral arranged and first session scheduled for Jul 26.

name: PT Start
description: Injured worker begins physical therapy rehabilitation.

name: PT Report Received
description: 30-day PT progress report received. Continued improvement noted, another 30-day cycle scheduled.
